function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Requested invoice copy (2025-12-18)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Attached is the requested invoice from 18-12-2025 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write succeeded; checklist review: attachment path was previously read, single attachment so ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email. Subject has no colon-space hazard. Proceeding to inbox cleanup per workflow.
next_step.observation: The outbound draft file write returned success with no validation errors.

next_step.current_state: Task actions completed: processed oldest inbox message, created outbox draft with requested invoice, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successful processing.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing an outbound email draft to Claudia with the requested Helios invoice from 2025-12-18 attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inbox workflow docs, email-processing and sending-email workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted processed inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked for the 18-12-2025 Helios invoice. Canonical sender verification succeeded because `from: claudia@helios-tax.example` matches 10_entities/cast/claudia.md primary_contact_email. Requested invoice exactly matched 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md (issued_on 2025-12-18, Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH). Created outbox draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with that attachment and then deleted processed inbox file per workflow.
